name: Caribbean Vegetarian Curry
recipeIngredient: 3 each Med Banana, green tip, peel
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut bananas in half crosswise, then lengthwise to make 12 pieces.
2. Saute the banana slices in a non-stick skillet with 2 tbsp margarine until lightly browned. Remove to a plate.
3. Add 1 tsp margarine to the skillet. Saute onion, garlic, and apple until soft.
4. Combine curry powder, lemon peel, ginger, coriander, turmeric, and red pepper in a bowl.
5. Stir the spice mixture into the onion mixture.
6. Add black-eyed peas, undrained kidney beans, and raisins to the skillet. Cover and simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Remove from heat and stir in yogurt.
8. Place egg halves on rice. Surround with sauteed banana pieces. Spoon curry over the dish.
9. Top with radishes, green onions, cilantro, and peanuts.
Calories per serving: 406
Fat grams per serving: 8.8
Approx. Cook Time: N/A
Cholesterol per serving: 138
